title: cobblemon pokeinsano
description: data pack for cobblemon, this add differents type of pokemon to the mod
body:
The pokemon added by the data pack are the following



1. IMPORTANT, now the gmax forms are independent, which means that when it evolves into its gmax form, it can also return to its original form.


2. "nests" were added, which are generated around the world, where gmax forms spawn at level 70, their rarity is common and weight 0.9

3. now the wild gmax forms your loot is candies and rare candies

4. spawn ratio gmax forms in nests is, common and weight 5.0

   

requires to be placed in 2 folders
 
minecraft/resource packs

minecraft/saves/world/datapacks



 

- wobbuffet (spawn in jungle rare)
- wynaut (spawn in jungle uncommon)
- meowth gmax added, evolves from meowth kanto at level 70, base hp stats multiplied by 2 (40=80)
- eevee gmax, evolves eevee at level 70, base hp stats multiplied by 2 (55=110) 
- all deoxys forms (spawn in the end all forms lvl 70)
- chewtle (spawn in coast uncommon)
- drednaw this (spawn in coast rare)
- stonjourner (spawn in desert uncommon)
- inkay (spawn in the end uncommon)
- malamar (spawn in the end rare)
- cufant (spawn in savanna uncommon) 
- Copperajah (spawn in savanna rare)
- pancham (spawn in jungle uncommon)
- pangoro (spawn in jungle rare)
- genesect (spawn in the end ultra-rare)
- slakoth (spawn in jungle common)
- vigoroth (spawn in jungle uncommon)
- slaking (spawn in jungle rare)
- karrablast (spawn in jungle uncommon)
- escavalier (spawn in jungle rare)
- gulpin (spawn in swamp common) 
- swalot (spawn in swamp uncommon)
- copperajah gmax, evolves copperajah at level 70, base hp stats multiplied by 2 (122=244) 
- drednaw gmax, evolves drednaw at level 70, base hp stats multiplied by 2 (90=180) 
- butterfree gmax, evolves butterfree at level 70, base hp stats multiplied by 2 (60=120) 
- melmetal gmax, evolves melmetal at level 70, base hp stats multiplied by 2 (135=270)(If you don't have Melmetal in any of your datapacks, you can directly capture its gmax form in the nests.)
- duraludon gmax, evolves duraludon at level 70, base hp stats multiplied by 2 (70=140)(If you don't have duraludon in any of your datapacks, you can directly capture its gmax form in the nests.)
  

All models, animations and textures have been created by me using blockbench

![gmax nest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3deb9db227fad1534df68f1064676f94a59ed6cb.png)
